title: selinum dauricum
intro: Selinum dauricum, also known as Wild Angelica, is a perennial plant species belonging to the carrot family (Apiaceae). This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and expectorant effects. The health benefits of Selinum dauricum include relieving respiratory issues such as coughs and bronchitis, reducing fever, and alleviating digestive problems. Selinum dauricum can be prepared as a tea, infusion, or tincture, and is often combined with other herbs to enhance its medicinal properties.
